summary: Otterly (ADHD calm task-starter) end-to-end test: 16/16 backend pytest tests PASS on public URL; full mobile web flow (welcome -> firstshrink -> name -> Next tab -> tabs) works end-to-end. Claude Sonnet 4.6 via Emergent LLM key produces on-brief AI output for /shrink (3-10 steps @ 5/10/25 min), /next (energy-aware pick with warm reason), /braindump (paragraph -> multiple task titles), and /room/message (short warm reply). No deprecated Expo packages (no expo-av/expo-barcode-scanner/expo-background-fetch). No React Native red screen. Dark-mode toggle visually confirmed via screenshot.

issues: Console shows repeated 404s for a handful of resources (likely web-only asset requests, e.g. favicon/manifest). Cosmetic; does not affect functionality but worth checking to keep the console clean.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Emitted by react-native-web internals under Expo SDK; benign, but noisy. Reference: emitted on every screen mount.

action_items: (Optional) Silence 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' warning by upgrading/using style.pointerEvents where custom; most of it comes from react-native-web itself and can be safely ignored.
(Optional) Investigate the 5 console 404s (favicon / PWA manifest / web font source) to clean the browser console.

(Nice to have) Add data-testid='onboarding-begin' path unification -- already present; consider also adding testID='next-tab', 'inbox-tab', 'room-tab', 'you-tab' on tab bar for more robust nav tests. Currently text=Inbox etc works but is fragile when other elements share those words.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py cleanly excludes MongoDB _id (uses projection {"_id":0}) — good.
All URLs come from env (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, MONGO_URL, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY); no hardcoded values found.
LLM JSON parser strips fenced code + tolerates leading prose — good defensive coding.

Every interactive element in tested screens has a testID (confirmed live: onboarding-begin, first-task-input, onboarding-shrink, user-name-input, onboarding-finish, energy-{low|medium|good}, next-start, next-pick-another, next-too-tired, quick-add-btn, braindump-btn, room-send, msg-{user|otter}, step-toggle-{id}, settings-dark, streak-card, etc.).

Non-blocking: shrink is fire-and-forget from onboarding (api.shrinkTask(...).catch()); acceptable but errors are silently swallowed. Consider a subtle warning if it fails so the Next tab doesn't sit empty.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); works but consider migrating to lifespan handlers.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of critical flows verified (welcome, onboarding shrink+name, Next card + energy switch + pick-another, Inbox quick-add + braindump splitting into multiple tasks, Room greeting + user/otter bubbles, You streak card, Dark mode visual toggle, Shrinker screen with difficulty pills + step checkboxes + timer + step-toggle)

seed_data_creation: Test tasks with TEST_ prefix were created and cleaned up in teardown. Braindump produced multi-task splits (Book dentist, Reply to Mom, File BIR return) as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows are green. testIDs are in place across onboarding, Next, Inbox (quick + braindump), Room (msg-user/msg-otter, room-send), Shrinker (step-toggle-{id}, timer-toggle-{id}), and You (streak-card, settings-dark). Backend pytest suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_otterly_api.py -- reuse as regression. If retesting after edits, run: `python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/test_otterly_api.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL for public URL testing.
